overall_arc.name: Opening — single line of moonlight on still water
overall_arc.intent: Establish the room. A thin line of moonlight on dark water, a solitary silhouette appearing slowly, deep shadow palette. Place one durable anchor and let it hold.

overall_arc.name: First ascent toward the pivot
overall_arc.intent: Energy builds stepwise. Warmth gathers — pale candlelight enters, an open palm appears in anticipation of the first tahwil. The line of moonlight widens.

overall_arc.name: Pivot station — first muhayyar approach
overall_arc.intent: Tahwil at cycle 7. Composite scene — open palm in low candlelight, moonlight bloom, a single text fragment. Sustained on G; loose linen falls; quiet hold at cycle 10 with a single feather at rest.

overall_arc.name: Climax — muhayyar arrival, fullest weight
overall_arc.intent: Re-ascent into peak intensity. Second tahwil at 13 brings the muhayyar — full-stage moonlight band, warm parchment wash, composite scene with image dominant. Elevation, not impact. Begin cooling palette at 16.

overall_arc.name: Quiet pivot — back at the window
overall_arc.intent: Energy drops sharply. Third tahwil at 18 is paradoxically dark — back at a window at night, head bowed in shadow. Phrase break at 21 holds stillness; brief reanimation at 22 before settling.

overall_arc.name: Final tableau — settling to D
overall_arc.intent: Phrase break at 23 contracts the scene. A single warm anchor holds. Gentle return through 'what stayed', solitary figure recedes, single feather drifts. Final phrase break at 29 leaves moonlight on water alone.

per_cycle_intent.intent: Open with a single thin line of moonlight on still water at center. Deep shadow background. Nothing else.
Place one short text fragment ('after' or 'alone in the room') in lower-left. The moonlight begins to breathe with hijaz_intensity.
A solitary figure silhouette enters the right edge — small, rooted. The line of moonlight extends slightly.
Head bowed in shadow joins as a quiet midground anchor. Hold; do not add. The room settles.
Image: an open palm in low candlelight enters as a medium inset on the right. Plant the feather motif as a small SVG at upper-right for later payoff.
A second text fragment — 'before the light fades' — at upper-center. Warm parchment edges into the palette via setBackground.
Anticipate the pivot. Transform the moonlight line — slow scale to widen. The open palm warms (saturation up). Quiet ramp.
TAHWIL. Composite scene: open palm (large inset, breathe preset), warm bloom SVG, text 'a quiet rising'. Background shifts to warm radial-gradient. Elevation, not impact.
Sustained on G. Image of loose linen falling across a dark surface enters as a column or half-canvas. Moonlight line continues breathing.
p5 sketch: soft breath rising on cold glass, mid-left, small-medium, hijaz_intensity-driven. Floating on the upper jins.
Quiet hold (silence_ratio 0.26, dark timbre). Fade the older text from cycle 1. Single feather SVG settles. No new placements beyond the fade.
Re-ascent. Add a slow ripple SVG (drift preset) horizontal-band-middle. Palette shifts warmer via paletteShift.
Building toward muhayyar. Text fragment 'the breath stayed' enters with typewriter animation. Anticipate climax.
TAHWIL — second pivot. Composite scene: full-bleed moonlight on water image, sustained warm horizon SVG with hijaz_tahwil impulse scale, text 'what the room held'. Background to warmer wash.
Muhayyar elevation. Transform the moonlight band — wider, brighter. Single soft pulseScene at 0.25 intensity in pale candlelight color. Held breath releasing.
Sustained peak (RMS 0.074, the absolute peak). Image dominant — head bowed in shadow at full bleed, breathe preset on hijaz_intensity. Hold the muhayyar.
Beginning to settle. Morph the warm bloom toward cooler slate. Fade older text. Palette begins cooling.
Descent begins. Fade the climax composite group. Loose linen lingers; moonlight line returns to its earlier weight.
TAHWIL paradox — quiet, dark timbre, very sparse. Image: back of someone at a window at night, half-canvas right. Background shifts to deep slate.
Solitary figure walking across a dark plain at dusk enters as medium inset. p5 breath-on-glass remains. Quiet pivot held.
Loose linen drifts (drift preset on existing element). Single feather settles via transformElement — slow rotation. No new images.
PHRASE BREAK. Hold completely. Fade one aging element (the warm horizon SVG from earlier). Stillness as composition.
Brief reanimation — moonlight line breathes once. textAnimate the 'what the room held' fragment with wordByWord. Hold.
PHRASE BREAK at 120s. Contract. Fade the cycle-19 figure image. Single warm anchor remains — open palm or moonlight.
Held quiet on G. No new placements. Allow the always-on shader bed to carry the room.
Gentle return. Text fragment 'what stayed' enters lower-center, serif, small. Echo of the opening palette.
Soft warmth recovers. paletteShift back toward warm parchment, slow duration. The room remembers the muhayyar.
Descent toward tonic. Single feather payoff — drift preset activates fully, the feather settles toward bottom-center. Head bowed remains.
Deepening dusk. Fade non-essential. Final composite preparation: moonlight + feather + 'what stayed' is the tableau.
PHRASE BREAK and silence (0.67 ratio). No new placements. Fade everything except the moonlight on water and one text fragment. Final tableau.

anchors: thin line of moonlight on still water
solitary figure walking across a dark plain at dusk
loose linen falling across a dark surface
back of someone at a window at night

palette_progression.palette: deep shadow #2a1f14 with slate-blue moonlight #4a6670 and pale candlelight #f5e6c8 accents
warming — sand gold #d4a574 entering, deep shadow holding, pale candlelight on the palm
warm parchment #e8d4a0 and burnt ochre #c4894a, the room widened on the pivot
fullest warmth — burnt ochre #c4894a and deep terracotta #8b4a2a, pale candlelight halo at muhayyar
cooling back to slate-blue #4a6670 and muted steel #8a9ba0, deep shadow returning
deep shadow #2a1f14 dominant, a single warm anchor of sand gold #d4a574, settling to moonlight only

foreshadow_pairs.note: Thin line of moonlight planted in opening blooms into full-bleed muhayyar moonlight at second tahwil.
Single feather planted at first ascent drifts and settles in the descent toward tonic.
Open palm anticipates the first tahwil; arrives in the composite at cycle 7.
Breath on glass p5 sketch establishes the breath motif; reanimates briefly before final phrase break.
'The breath stayed' text typewriter-revealed before muhayyar — reads as the held breath of the climax.
'Before the light fades' text echoes in 'what stayed' at the final settling — testimonial accumulation.
The opening line of moonlight is the only element left in the final tableau — the room ends as it began.
